description.line1: Freelance fullstack developer specialised in TypeScript / Nuxt.js / Firebase. AI-augmented.
description.line2: 5 years of experience in agile teams on high-audience products.
description.line3: Software Craftsmanship advocate: TDD, DDD, pair programming.

paragraphs.p1: Passionate developer with over 15 years of experience in IT, I transitioned to development 4 years ago, driven by my passion for digital and discovering code and Software Craftsmanship best practices.
paragraphs.p2: My unique journey, starting as a helpdesk technician and evolving into system and network administration, has given me a holistic view of information systems. This experience enriches my development practice, allowing me to approach projects as a whole, from infrastructure to code.
paragraphs.p3: As a freelancer, I particularly focus on Clean Code principles and craft development practices. I firmly believe that code quality and long-term maintainability are as important as immediate functionality.
paragraphs.p4: My dual technical expertise — infrastructure and development — allows me to bring unique added value to projects, combining technical robustness and code excellence.

mgm.title: MGM — MyGameMobile
mgm.description: Design and development of a mobile performance analysis and decision-making app. Project ownership, functional lead position. 10k users/month, worldwide.

fcs.title: FCS — Customer Satisfaction Family
fcs.description: Design and development of a mobile self-assessment application. 5K users/month, worldwide.

stic.title: STIC — Transverse Cycle Identification Solution
stic.shortDescription: Cycle pairing and registration mobile app
stic.description: Design and development of a mobile cycle pairing and registration app. QR Code scanner implementation. 2K users/day, France.

winky.title: Winkyverse
winky.description: Design and development of an ICO platform. 15K users, worldwide. Fundraising 10M+ euros.

mechachain.title: Mechachain
mechachain.description: Design and development of an ICO platform. KYC implementation. 10K users, worldwide.

mc.title: Managers Companion
mc.shortDescription: Mobile and desktop app for store staff
mc.description: Design and development of a mobile and desktop application for store staff, for performance analysis and self-assessment. Integration of an AI layer with agentic architecture.
